name: google-models
description: Google Gemini models — chat, embedding, image generation (Imagen / gemini-image), video generation (Veo), and text-to-speech. Bring your own Gemini API key; one instance serves every use case.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Google Gemini API Key
x-meta.help: Your Google Gemini API key. Leave empty to fall back to the GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: A Gemini model id. Empty = resolved from live /v1/models discovery.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional override of the Google Gemini base URL. Empty uses https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/.
